test_step: Navigate to /pos; Wait for page to load
expected_result: POS screen loads full-screen; Top bar visible with location, cashier name, clock, Exit button; Product grid visible on left; Cart panel visible on right with 'Cart is empty' message

test_step: On POS screen; Wait for products to load
expected_result: Product grid shows product tiles with name and price; Category tabs visible with 'All' tab; Search input visible and auto-focused

test_step: On POS screen; Click a category tab; Observe products
expected_result: Products filter by selected category; Clicking 'All' shows all products again

test_step: On POS screen; Type product name in search bar; Wait for debounce
expected_result: Products filter by search term; Clearing search shows all products

test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/pos/transaction; Wait for page
expected_result: Transaction History page loads with title; Table with columns: Transaction ID, Location, Cashier, Total, Payment, Status, Date; 'Open POS Terminal' button visible

test_desc: Full CRUD - Add product to cart
test_step: On POS screen; Click a product tile
expected_result: Product appears in cart panel; Cart shows product name, SKU, unit price; Quantity shows 1; Cart item count badge shows 1; Subtotal and Total update

test_desc: Full CRUD - Add same product twice (quantity increment)
test_step: On POS screen with item in cart; Click same product tile again
expected_result: Quantity increments to 2 (not duplicate entry); Line total doubles; Cart totals update correctly

test_desc: Full CRUD - Adjust quantity with +/- buttons
test_step: On POS screen with item in cart; Click + button; Click - button
expected_result: + increases qty by 1; - decreases qty by 1; Totals update after each click

test_desc: Full CRUD - Remove item from cart
test_step: On POS screen with items in cart; Click trash/remove button on item
expected_result: Item removed from cart; Totals recalculate; If last item removed, cart shows empty state

test_step: On POS screen with items in cart; Click Pay button; Select Cash payment; Enter amount tendered; Click 'Complete Sale'
expected_result: Checkout dialog shows total; Change calculated correctly; After completion: success screen with transaction ID, total, change; 'New Sale' button visible

test_desc: Full CRUD - New sale after checkout
test_step: After completing a checkout; Click 'New Sale' button
expected_result: Cart clears; Product grid ready for next customer; Previous transaction ID was generated

test_step: Add items to cart; Click Pay; Select Card payment; Enter reference; Complete sale
expected_result: Checkout completes with card payment method; No change calculation shown; Transaction created

test_step: Navigate to /console/modules/pos/transaction; Click on transaction ID link
expected_result: Transaction detail page loads; Shows transaction ID, status, location, cashier; Shows payment method, totals; Items table visible with product, qty, unit price, line total

test_step: On transaction detail page (completed status); Click 'Void Transaction'; Enter reason; Confirm
expected_result: Transaction status changes to 'voided'; Void banner appears with reason and voider info; No more void button visible

test_desc: Full CRUD - Status filter on transaction list
test_step: Navigate to transaction list; Select 'Completed' from status filter; Select 'Voided'; Select 'All'
expected_result: Completed filter: only completed transactions; Voided filter: only voided transactions; All: all transactions visible

test_step: Navigate to transaction list; Type transaction ID in search
expected_result: Matching transactions shown; Results update dynamically

test_step: Complete a checkout via API; Check generated transaction ID
expected_result: Transaction ID matches format {LOCATION_CODE}-{YYYYMMDD}-{SEQ:4}

test_step: Add items to cart; Click Clear button
expected_result: All items removed; Cart shows empty state; Totals reset to 0

test_step: On POS screen; Click view toggle button
expected_result: Switches between grid view (tiles) and list view (rows); Products same in both views

test_desc: Edge Case - Exit button navigates to dashboard
test_step: On POS screen; Click Exit button
expected_result: Navigates to /console/dashboard

test_desc: Edge Case - Transaction appears in list after checkout
test_step: Complete a checkout; Navigate to transaction list
expected_result: New transaction visible in list with correct ID, total, payment method, and 'completed' status

test_desc: Edge Case - Void restores inventory (API level)
test_step: Complete a checkout via API; Note inventory; Void transaction; Check inventory restored
expected_result: Inventory decremented on checkout; Inventory restored on void

test_step: On checkout dialog with cash selected; Enter exact amount; Enter higher amount
expected_result: Exact amount: change shows 0; Higher amount: correct change displayed

test_desc: Edge Case - Breadcrumbs on transaction view
test_step: Navigate to transaction view page
expected_result: Breadcrumbs show 'Transaction History' link and transaction ID

test_desc: Edge Case - Sort columns on transaction list
test_step: Click Transaction ID column; Click Total column; Click Date column
expected_result: URL updates with sort parameter; Columns sortable asc/desc

test_desc: Edge Case - Performance - POS screen loads fast
test_step: Navigate to /pos; Measure load time
expected_result: POS screen loads within 10 seconds including products
